subcodes.first_line: The Eternal cannot be described through attributes temporal; sanctified and exalted is He above the mentions of this world of quantity and qualification [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: واجب را حادث وصف نداند بیچون از اذکار عالم چند و چون مقدس و مبری است لم یرفعه
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @transcendence; unknowability of God
